case_title: CAITLIN JOHNSON VS. RYAN STEELE PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN STEELE PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, CAITLIN AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN STEELE PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED OCT-21-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN STEELE PROPERTIES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, CAITLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYAN STEELE PROPERTIES $560.71 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $610.71, BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS CHARGED PRORATED RENT ($473.41); SHELF & CLEANING ($138.00); AND RENT BOARD FEES ($50.00). BALANCE INCLUDES INTEREST ($103.60) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CAITLIN JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN STEELE PROPERTIES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.
